      h_val m (by omega), h_val n (by omega), h_val (m + n) (by omega), 
      h_val (2 * m) (by omega), h_val (2 * n) (by omega),
      ←Finset.sum_add_distrib, ←Finset.sum_add_distrib, ←Finset.sum_add_distrib, ←Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  refine Finset.sum_le_sum (fun i _ => ?_)
  let k := p ^ i
  have hk : 0 < k := Nat.pos_pow_of_pos i (Nat.Prime.pos hp)
  have h1 : (m + n) / k = m / k + n / k + (m % k + n % k) / k := by
    rw [m.div_add_mod k, n.div_add_mod k, add_add_add_comm, mul_add, ← add_mul, Nat.add_mul_div_right _ _ hk]
  have h2 : (2 * m) / k = 2 * (m / k) + (2 * (m % k)) / k := by
    rw [m.div_add_mod k, mul_add, mul_assoc, Nat.add_mul_div_right _ _ hk]
  have h3 : (2 * n) / k = 2 * (n / k) + (2 * (n % k)) / k := by
    rw [n.div_add_mod k, mul_add, mul_assoc, Nat.add_mul_div_right _ _ hk]
  rw [h1, h2, h3]
  gcongr
  let rm := m % k; let rn := n % k
  cases lt_or_ge (rm + rn) k with
  | inl h => rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt h]; positivity
  | inr h =>
    rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le (Nat.add_lt_add (Nat.mod_lt _ hk) (Nat.mod_lt _ hk)) h]
    cases lt_or_ge (2 * rm) k with
    | inl hrm =>
      apply Nat.le_add_left
      apply Nat.le_div_of_mul_le hk
      linarith
    | inr hrm =>
      apply Nat.le_add_right
      apply Nat.le_div_of_mul_le hk hrm

apply Nat.dvd_iff_multiplicity_le.mpr
  intro p hp
  let N := 2 * m + 2 * n + 1
  have h_fact : ∀ k, k ≤ N → multiplicity p k ! = (∑ i in Finset.range N, k / p ^ (i + 1) : ℕ) := by
    intro k hk
    rw [Nat.multiplicity_factorial hp]
    refine Finset.sum_subset (Finset.range_subset.mpr hk) ?_
    intro i _ hi
    have : k < p ^ (i + 1) := lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_of_not_lt (Finset.mem_range.mp hi)) (Nat.lt_pow_self hp.one_lt _)
    exact Nat.div_eq_of_lt this
  rw [multiplicity.mul hp, multiplicity.mul hp, multiplicity.mul hp]
  rw [h_fact m (le_trans (Nat.le_add_right _ _) (Nat.le_add_right _ _)),
      h_fact n (le_trans (Nat.le_add_left _ _) (Nat.le_add_right _ _)),
      h_fact (m + n) (Nat.le_trans (Nat.add_le_add (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left zero_lt_two) (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left zero_lt_two)) (Nat.le_add_right _ _)),
      h_fact (2 * m) (Nat.le_trans (Nat.le_add_right _ _) (Nat.le_add_right _ _)),
      h_fact (2 * n) (Nat.le_trans (Nat.le_add_left _ _) (Nat.le_add_right _ _))]
  simp only [PartENat.add_coe, PartENat.coe_le_coe]
  rw [← Finset.sum_add_distrib, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  refine Finset.sum_le_sum fun i _ => ?_
  let q := p ^ (i + 1)
  have h_add := Nat.add_div m n q
  have h_2m : (2 * m) / q = 2 * (m / q) + if 2 * (m % q) ≥ q then 1 else 0 := by rw [two_mul, Nat.add_div]
  have h_2n : (2 * n) / q = 2 * (n / q) + if 2 * (n % q) ≥ q then 1 else 0 := by rw [two_mul, Nat.add_div]
  rw [h_add, h_2m, h_2n]
  simp only [two_mul, add_assoc, add_left_comm]
  refine Nat.add_le_add_left (le_of_not_lt fun h_lt => ?_) _
  split_ifs at h_lt with h1 h2 h3
  · have := add_lt_add (Nat.lt_of_not_ge h2) (Nat.lt_of_not_ge h3)
    rw [← mul_add] at this
    exact not_le_of_lt (lt_of_mul_lt_mul_left this zero_lt_two) h1
  · exact (not_lt_of_ge (zero_le _)) h_lt
  · exact (not_lt_of_ge (zero_le _)) h_lt
  · exact (not_lt_of_ge (zero_le _)) h_lt

let q (m n : ℕ) : ℚ := ((2 * m)! * (2 * n)!) / (m ! * n ! * (m + n)!)
  have h_symm (m n : ℕ) : q m n = q n m := by
    simp [q, mul_comm, add_comm]
  have h_rec (m n : ℕ) : q m (n + 1) = q m n * (2 * (2 * n + 1)) / (m + n + 1) := by
    simp only [q]
    have h1 : (2 * (n + 1))! = (2 * n + 2) * (2 * n + 1) * (2 * n)! := by
      rw [mul_add, mul_one, Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.factorial_succ]; ring
    rw [h1, Nat.factorial_succ (n + 1), Nat.factorial_succ (m + n)]
    push_cast
    field_simp
    ring
  have h_sum (m n : ℕ) : q m (n + 1) + q (m + 1) n = 4 * q m n := by
    rw [h_rec m n, h_symm (m + 1) n, h_rec n m, h_symm n m]
    field_simp
    rw [← add_div, ← mul_add]
    congr; ring
  have h_int (n m : ℕ) : ∃ k : ℕ, q m n = k := by
    induction n generalizing m with
    | zero =>
      use (2 * m).choose m
      simp [q, Nat.choose_eq_factorial_div_factorial]
      field_simp
    | succ n ih =>
      obtain ⟨km, hkm⟩ := ih m
      obtain ⟨km1, hkm1⟩ := ih (m + 1)
      use 4 * km - km1
      have h_ineq : km1 ≤ 4 * km := by
        rw [← Nat.cast_le (α := ℚ), ← hkm, ← hkm1, ← h_sum m n]
        simp only [le_add_iff_nonneg_left]
        apply div_nonneg <;> simp
      rw [Nat.cast_sub h_ineq, ← hkm, ← hkm1, ← h_sum m n]
      ring
  obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := h_int n m
  use k
  rw [← Nat.cast_inj (R := ℚ), hk, q]
  field_simp

refine Nat.dvd_of_padicValNat_le (by positivity) (fun p hp => ?_)
  simp only [Nat.padicValNat_mul (Nat.Prime.pos hp), Nat.padicValNat_factorial hp]
  refine Finset.sum_le_sum (fun k _ => ?_)
  let x := p ^ k
  have hx : 0 < x := Nat.pos_pow_of_pos k (Nat.Prime.pos hp)
  rw [← Nat.add_div_eq_mul_add_div _ _ hx]
  have h2m : (2 * m) / x = 2 * (m / x) + (2 * (m % x)) / x := by
    rw [← Nat.add_div_eq_mul_add_div (2 * m) x hx, mul_comm x, Nat.mul_add_div hx, mul_comm 2]
  have h2n : (2 * n) / x = 2 * (n / x) + (2 * (n % x)) / x := by
    rw [← Nat.add_div_eq_mul_add_div (2 * n) x hx, mul_comm x, Nat.mul_add_div hx, mul_comm 2]
  rw [h2m, h2n]
  apply Nat.add_le_add (le_refl _)
  have h_sum : m % x + n % x < 2 * x := by linarith [Nat.mod_lt m hx, Nat.mod_lt n hx]
  have h_lhs : (m % x + n % x) / x ≤ 1 := Nat.div_le_of_lt_le h_sum (by linarith)
  cases Nat.le_or_lt 1 ((m % x + n % x) / x) with
  | inl h =>
    have h_ge : x ≤ m % x + n % x := Nat.le_of_div_le_of_pos h hx
    have : 1 ≤ (2 * (m % x)) / x + (2 * (n % x)) / x := by
      by_contra hc
      have h0 : (2 * (m % x)) / x = 0 := Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero (le_trans (Nat.le_of_add_le_right hc) (zero_le _))
      have h1 : (2 * (n % x)) / x = 0 := Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero (le_trans (Nat.le_of_add_le_left hc) (zero_le _))
      rw [Nat.div_eq_zero_iff hx] at h0 h1
      linarith
    linarith
  | inr h =>
    rw [Nat.eq_zero_of_lt_one h]
    apply zero_le

refine Nat.dvd_of_forall_prime_pow_dvd (by simp [Nat.factorial_ne_zero]) fun p hp => ?_
  rw [Nat.pow_dvd_iff_le_padicValNat (by simp [Nat.factorial_ne_zero]) hp]
  simp only [Nat.padicValNat_mul (by simp [Nat.factorial_ne_zero]) (by simp [Nat.factorial_ne_zero]), padicValNat_factorial _ hp]
  let K := 2 * (m + n) + 1
  let S (N : ℕ) := ∑ i in Finset.Ico 1 K, N / p ^ i
  have hS : ∀ N, N ≤ 2 * (m + n) → padicValNat p N ! = S N := fun N hN ↦ by
    unfold S; rw [padicValNat_factorial _ hp]
    apply Finset.sum_subset (Finset.Ico_subset_Ico (le_refl _) (Nat.add_le_add_right hN _))
    intro i hi hmem
    rw [Finset.mem_Ico] at hi hmem
    rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt]
    exact lt_of_le_of_lt (le_trans hN (Nat.le_trans (Nat.lt_pow_self (by norm_num) _) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_left hp.two_le _))) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right hp.one_lt (le_of_not_lt (fun a => hmem (Finset.mem_Ico.2 ⟨hi.1, a⟩))))
  rw [hS m (le_trans (Nat.le_add_right _ _) (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left _ (by norm_num))),
      hS n (le_trans (Nat.le_add_left _ _) (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left _ (by norm_num))),
      hS (m+n) (Nat.le_mul_of_pos_left _ (by norm_num)),
      hS (2*m) (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 (Nat.le_add_right _ _)),
      hS (2*n) (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 (Nat.le_add_left _ _))]
  simp only [S, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _
  let x := p ^ i
  have hx : 0 < x := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (Nat.pow_ne_zero _ hp.ne_zero)
  rw [Nat.add_div m n x]
  have h_mul (k : ℕ) : (2 * k) / x = 2 * (k / x) + (2 * (k % x)) / x := by
    nth_rewrite 1 [← Nat.div_add_mod k x]
    rw [mul_add, mul_assoc, mul_comm 2 x, ← mul_assoc, Nat.mul_add_div _ _ hx]
  rw [h_mul m, h_mul n]
  simp only [add_assoc, add_left_comm]
  gcongr
  set u := m % x; set v := n % x
  by_cases h : u + v < x
  · rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt h]; exact Nat.zero_le _
  · have h_ge : x ≤ u + v := le_of_not_lt h
    have h_lt : u + v < 2 * x := lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.add_le_add (Nat.mod_lt _ hx) (Nat.mod_lt _ hx)) (by linarith)
    have eq1 : (u + v) / x = 1 := by
      rw [Nat.div_eq_iff_eq_mul_left (by norm_num) (by linarith)]
      constructor <;> linarith
    rw [eq1]
    cases le_or_lt x (2 * u) with
    | inl h2u => calc 1 ≤ (2 * u) / x := (Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le hx).mpr h2u; _ ≤ _ := Nat.le_add_right _ _
    | inr h2u => 
        have : 2 * x ≤ 2 * u + 2 * v := by linarith
        have h2v : x ≤ 2 * v := by linarith
        calc 1 ≤ (2 * v) / x := (Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le hx).mpr h2v; _ ≤ _ := Nat.le_add_left _ _

have aux (m n q : ℕ) (hq : 0 < q) : m / q + n / q + (m + n) / q ≤ (2 * m) / q + (2 * n) / q := by
    let a := m / q; let r := m % q
    let b := n / q; let s := n % q
    have hm : m = a * q + r := Nat.div_add_mod m q
    have hn : n = b * q + s := Nat.div_add_mod n q
    have hr : r < q := Nat.mod_lt m hq
    have hs : s < q := Nat.mod_lt n hq
    rw [hm, hn]
    simp only [Nat.add_mul_div_left _ _ hq, Nat.mul_div_cancel_left _ hq]
    rw [show a * q + r + (b * q + s) = (a + b) * q + (r + s) by ring]
    rw [show 2 * (a * q + r) = 2 * a * q + 2 * r by ring]
    rw [show 2 * (b * q + s) = 2 * b * q + 2 * s by ring]
    simp only [Nat.add_mul_div_left _ _ hq]
    gcongr
    · linarith
    cases Nat.lt_or_ge (r + s) q with
    | inl h =>
      rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt h]
      exact Nat.zero_le _
    | inr h =>
      have h_lt : r + s < 2 * q := by linarith
      rw [Nat.div_eq_of_le_of_lt h h_lt]
      have : q ≤ 2 * r ∨ q ≤ 2 * s := by
        contrapose! h_lt
        have : 2 * r + 2 * s < 2 * q := Nat.add_lt_add h_lt.1 h_lt.2
        linarith
      cases this with
      | inl h2r =>
        calc 1 ≤ (2 * r) / q := Nat.le_div_of_mul_le hq h2r
             _ ≤ (2 * r) / q + (2 * s) / q := Nat.le_add_right _ _
      | inr h2s =>
        calc 1 ≤ (2 * s) / q := Nat.le_div_of_mul_le hq h2s
             _ ≤ (2 * r) / q + (2 * s) / q := Nat.le_add_left _ _

  rw [Nat.dvd_iff_padicValNat_le (by simp [Nat.factorial_pos]) (by simp [Nat.factorial_pos])]
  intro p hp
  repeat rw [padicValNat.mul p (by simp [Nat.factorial_pos])]
  let K := 2 * (m + n) + 1
  have h_val (k : ℕ) : padicValNat p k ! = ∑ i in Finset.range K, k / p ^ (i + 1) := by
    rw [padicValNat_factorial p k hp]
    apply Finset.sum_subset (Finset.range_subset.mpr (le_trans (Nat.log_le_self p k) (by linarith)))
    intro x _ hx
    rw [Finset.mem_range, not_lt] at hx
    rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt]
    exact Nat.lt_pow_of_log_lt p hx
  repeat rw [h_val]
  rw [← Finset.sum_add_distrib, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  apply Finset.sum_le_sum
  intro i _
  exact aux m n (p ^ (i + 1)) (Nat.pow_pos (Nat.Prime.pos hp) _)

have h_nz : (2 * m)! * (2 * n)! ≠ 0 := mul_ne_zero (Nat.factorial_ne_zero _) (Nat.factorial_ne_zero _)
  rw [Nat.dvd_iff_le_padicValNat_of_ne_zero h_nz]
  intro p pp
  simp only [Nat.padicValNat_mul (Nat.factorial_ne_zero _) (Nat.factorial_ne_zero _)]
  let N := 2 * (m + n) + 1
  have h_sum : ∀ k, k ≤ 2 * (m + n) → padicValNat p k ! = ∑ i in Finset.Ico 1 N, k / p ^ i := by
    intro k hk
    rw [Nat.Prime.padicValNat_factorial pp]
    refine Finset.sum_subset_zero_on_sdiff (Finset.Ico_subset_Ico (le_refl _) (Nat.succ_le_succ (le_trans hk (Nat.le_of_lt (lt_add_one _))))) ?_
    intro i hi hmem
    simp at hi hmem
    rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt]
    calc k < k + 1 := lt_add_one k
         _ ≤ i := le_of_not_lt hmem.2
         _ < 2 ^ i := Nat.lt_pow_self (by norm_num) i
         _ ≤ p ^ i := Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_left (Nat.Prime.two_le pp) i
  rw [h_sum m (le_trans (Nat.le_add_right _ _) (Nat.le_add_left _ _)), 
      h_sum n (le_trans (Nat.le_add_left _ _) (Nat.le_add_left _ _)), 
      h_sum (m+n) (Nat.le_add_left _ _), 
      h_sum (2*m) (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 (Nat.le_add_right m n)), 
      h_sum (2*n) (Nat.mul_le_mul_left 2 (Nat.le_add_left n m))]
  rw [←Finset.sum_add_distrib, ←Finset.sum_add_distrib, ←Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  apply Finset.sum_le_sum
  intro i hi
  rw [Nat.add_div_eq_add_add_div, Nat.mul_div_eq_mul_div_add_mod, Nat.mul_div_eq_mul_div_add_mod]
  ring_nf
  set x := p ^ i
  have hx : 0 < x := Nat.pow_pos (Nat.Prime.pos pp) i
  set a := m % x; set b := n % x
  have : (a + b) / x ≤ 1 := by rw [Nat.div_le_iff_le_mul_add_pred hx]; linarith [Nat.mod_lt m hx, Nat.mod_lt n hx]
  trans 1
  · exact le_add_left (le_trans this (le_refl _))
  · cases' Nat.le_or_lt x (a + b) with h h
    · have : 1 ≤ (2 * a) / x ∨ 1 ≤ (2 * b) / x := by
        rw [Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le x hx, Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le x hx]
        by_contra! h'
        linarith
      cases' this with h' h' <;> linarith
    · rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt h]; linarith

let P := m ! * n ! * (m + n)!
  let Q := (2 * m)! * (2 * n)!
  have hP : P ≠ 0 := by apply Nat.mul_ne_zero (Nat.mul_ne_zero m.factorial_ne_zero n.factorial_ne_zero) (m + n).factorial_ne_zero
  have hQ : Q ≠ 0 := by apply Nat.mul_ne_zero (2 * m).factorial_ne_zero (2 * n).factorial_ne_zero
  rw [Nat.dvd_iff_padicValNat_le hP hQ]
  intro p hp
  rw [padicValNat.mul p (Nat.mul_ne_zero m.factorial_ne_zero n.factorial_ne_zero),
      padicValNat.mul p m.factorial_ne_zero,
      padicValNat.mul p (2 * m).factorial_ne_zero]

  have aux : ∀ k > 0, m / k + n / k + (m + n) / k ≤ (2 * m) / k + (2 * n) / k := by
    intro k hk
    have div_decomp : ∀ x, (2 * x) / k = 2 * (x / k) + (2 * (x % k)) / k := fun x ↦ by
      rw [← Nat.div_add_mod x k, mul_add, mul_comm 2, mul_assoc, mul_comm k, Nat.add_mul_div_left _ _ hk, mul_comm 2]
    rw [Nat.add_div m n k, div_decomp m, div_decomp n]
    ring_nf
    gcongr
    let a := m % k; let b := n % k
    have ha : a < k := Nat.mod_lt _ hk
    have hb : b < k := Nat.mod_lt _ hk
    cases lt_or_ge (a + b) k with
    | inl h => rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt h]; simp
    | inr h =>
      rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le (by linarith) h]
      suffices 1 ≤ (2 * a) / k ∨ 1 ≤ (2 * b) / k by
        rcases this with h1 | h1 <;> linarith
      by_contra! hcon
      have h2a : 2 * a < k := Nat.div_eq_zero_iff.mp hcon.1
      have h2b : 2 * b < k := Nat.div_eq_zero_iff.mp hcon.2
      linarith

  let N := 2 * (m + n) + 1
  simp only [hp.padicValNat_factorial]
  let f (x n : ℕ) := n / p ^ x
  have sum_eq : ∀ n', n' < N → ∑ i in Finset.Ico 1 (n' + 1), f i n' = ∑ i in Finset.Ico 1 N, f i n' := by
    intro n' hn'
    apply Finset.sum_subset (Finset.Ico_subset_Ico (le_refl 1) (Nat.succ_le_of_lt hn'))
    intro x hx hmem
    rw [Finset.mem_Ico] at hx hmem
    simp [f]
    apply Nat.div_eq_of_lt
    apply lt_of_lt_of_le (lt_succ_self n')
    apply Nat.le_trans (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (Nat.Prime.two_le hp) (Nat.succ_le_of_lt hn'))
    apply Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (Nat.Prime.pos hp) hmem.1

  rw [sum_eq m (by linarith), sum_eq n (by linarith), sum_eq (m+n) (by linarith), 
      sum_eq (2*m) (by linarith), sum_eq (2*n) (by linarith)]
  
  rw [← Finset.sum_add_distrib, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  apply Finset.sum_le_sum
  intro i _
  apply aux (p ^ i) (Nat.pow_pos (Nat.Prime.pos hp) i)

rw [Nat.dvd_iff_multiplicity_le]
  intro p hp
  repeat rw [multiplicity.mul p]
  repeat rw [Nat.multiplicity_factorial hp]
  rw [← Nat.cast_add, ← Nat.cast_add, ← Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_le]
  let N := 2 * m + 2 * n + 1
  have h_sum : ∀ k ≤ 2 * m + 2 * n, ∑ i ∈ Finset.Ico 1 k.succ, k / p ^ i = ∑ i ∈ Finset.Ico 1 N, k / p ^ i := by
    intro k hk
    apply Finset.sum_subset
    · apply Finset.Ico_subset_Ico (le_refl _) (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.lt_succ_iff.1 (Nat.le_lt_of_le_of_lt hk (Nat.lt_succ_self _))))
    · intro i hi hmem
      rw [Finset.mem_Ico] at hi hmem
      rw [Nat.div_eq_zero_iff]
      calc k < p ^ k := Nat.lt_pow_self (Nat.Prime.one_lt hp) k
           _ ≤ p ^ i := Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le (Nat.Prime.pos hp) (Nat.le_of_lt_succ hmem.1)
      exact Nat.pos_pow_of_pos i (Nat.Prime.pos hp)
  rw [h_sum m (by linarith), h_sum n (by linarith), h_sum (m + n) (by linarith), h_sum (2 * m) (by linarith), h_sum (2 * n) (by linarith)]
  rw [← Finset.sum_add_distrib, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  apply Finset.sum_le_sum
  intro i hi
  rw [Finset.mem_Ico] at hi
  let q := p ^ i
  have hq : 0 < q := Nat.pos_pow_of_pos i (Nat.Prime.pos hp)
  have key : (m % q + n % q) / q ≤ (2 * (m % q)) / q + (2 * (n % q)) / q := by
    cases Nat.lt_or_ge (m % q + n % q) q with
    | inl h => rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt h]; exact Nat.zero_le _
    | inr h =>
      have h1 : (m % q + n % q) / q = 1 := by
        apply Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le h
        apply Nat.add_lt_add (Nat.mod_lt _ hq) (Nat.mod_lt _ hq)
      rw [h1]
      by_contra hc
      rw [not_le, Nat.lt_one_iff, add_eq_zero, Nat.div_eq_zero_iff hq, Nat.div_eq_zero_iff hq] at hc
      linarith
  have decomp : ∀ k, (2 * k) / q = 2 * (k / q) + (2 * (k % q)) / q := by
    intro k

      | inl h'' => calc 1 ≤ 2 * b / k := Nat.le_div_of_mul_le hk h''; _ ≤ _ := Nat.le_add_left _ _

    intro i hi hmem

    refine Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt ?_ (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_left hp.two_le i)
    simp at hi; omega
  rw [Nat.multiplicity_mul, Nat.multiplicity_mul, Nat.multiplicity_mul,
      h_supp m, h_supp n, h_supp (m + n), h_supp (2 * m), h_supp (2 * n)]
  rw [← Finset.sum_add_distrib, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]

  let x := p ^ i
  have hx : 0 < x := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (Nat.pow_ne_zero i hp.ne_zero)
  rw [Nat.add_div_eq_add_add_div _ _ x]

    intro k

    | inl h => rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt h]; simp
    | inr h =>

        by_contra hc

        have hB : 2 * (n % x) < x := Nat.div_eq_zero_iff.mp hc.2

induction n generalizing m with
  | zero =>
    rw [Nat.mul_zero, Nat.factorial_zero, Nat.mul_one, Nat.add_zero]
    use (2 * m).choose m
    rw [← Nat.choose_mul_factorial_mul_factorial]
    ring
  | succ n ih =>
    let A (k l : ℕ) := (2 * k)! * (2 * l)!
    let B (k l : ℕ) := k ! * l ! * (k + l)!
    have h_ident : (m + 1) * A m (n + 1) + (n + 1) * A (m + 1) n = 
        4 * (m + 1) * (n + 1) * (m + n + 1) * A m n := by
      dsimp only [A]
      have h1 : (2 * (n + 1))! = (2 * n)! * (2 * n + 1) * (2 * n + 2) := by
        rw [Nat.mul_add, Nat.mul_one, Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.factorial_succ]; ring
      have h2 : (2 * (m + 1))! = (2 * m)! * (2 * m + 1) * (2 * m + 2) := by
        rw [Nat.mul_add, Nat.mul_one, Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.factorial_succ]; ring
      rw [h1, h2]; ring
    let L := (m + 1)! * (n + 1)! * (m + n + 1)!
    have h1 : L ∣ (n + 1) * A (m + 1) n := by
      dsimp only [L]
      have : (m + 1)! * (n + 1)! * (m + n + 1)! = (n + 1) * ((m + 1)! * n ! * (m + 1 + n)!) := by
        rw [Nat.factorial_succ n, Nat.add_assoc]; ring
      rw [this]
      apply Nat.mul_dvd_mul_left
      convert ih (m + 1) using 1
      dsimp only [B]; rw [Nat.add_right_comm]
    have h2 : L ∣ 4 * (m + 1) * (n + 1) * (m + n + 1) * A m n := by
      dsimp only [L]
      have : 4 * (m + 1) * (n + 1) * (m + n + 1) * A m n = 
             ((m + 1) * (n + 1) * (m + n + 1)) * (4 * A m n) := by ring
      rw [this]
      have : (m + 1)! * (n + 1)! * (m + n + 1)! = 
             ((m + 1) * (n + 1) * (m + n + 1)) * B m n := by
        dsimp only [B]
        rw [Nat.factorial_succ m, Nat.factorial_succ n, Nat.factorial_succ (m + n)]; ring
      rw [this]
      apply Nat.mul_dvd_mul_left
      apply Nat.dvd_trans (ih m)
      use 4; ring
    have h3 : L ∣ (m + 1) * A m (n + 1) := by
      rw [← h_ident] at h2
      exact (Nat.dvd_add_iff_left h1).mpr h2
    have hL : L = (m + 1) * B m (n + 1) := by
      dsimp only [L, B]
      rw [Nat.factorial_succ m]; ring
    rw [hL] at h3
    apply Nat.dvd_of_mul_dvd_mul_left (Nat.succ_pos m) h3

  intro p k hp hk
  have hpos : 0 < m ! * n ! * (m + n)! := by positivity
  rw [← Nat.pow_dvd_iff_le_padicValNat hpos hp] at hk ⊢
  refine le_trans hk ?_
  -- Rewrite valuations as sums using Legendre's Formula
  simp only [Nat.padicValNat_mul (by positivity), Nat.padicValNat_factorial hp]
  let N := 2 * (m + n)
  let S := Finset.Ico 1 (N + 1)
  have ext : ∀ x, x ≤ N → ∑ i in Finset.Ico 1 (x + 1), x / p ^ i = ∑ i in S, x / p ^ i := by
    intro x hx
    apply Finset.sum_subset (Finset.Ico_subset_Ico (le_refl 1) (Nat.succ_le_succ hx))
    intro i hi hmem
    rw [Finset.mem_Ico] at hi hmem
    rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt]
    calc x < x + 1 := Nat.lt_succ_self x
      _ ≤ i := by simp at hmem; exact hmem
      _ ≤ p ^ i := Nat.le_pow_self hp.one_lt
  rw [ext m (by omega), ext n (by omega), ext (m+n) (by omega), ext (2*m) (by omega), ext (2*n) (by omega)]
  repeat rw [← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  apply Finset.sum_le_sum
  intro i _
  -- Prove the term-wise inequality: ⌊a⌋ + ⌊b⌋ + ⌊a+b⌋ ≤ ⌊2a⌋ + ⌊2b⌋
  have ineq : ∀ a b k, 0 < k → a / k + b / k + (a + b) / k ≤ (2 * a) / k + (2 * b) / k := by
    intro a b k hk
    rw [Nat.add_div a b k]
    have h2 : ∀ x, 2 * x = x + x := fun x => by ring
    rw [h2 a, h2 b, Nat.add_div a a k, Nat.add_div b b k]
    gcongr
    set r1 := a % k; set r2 := b % k
    have hr : r1 + r2 < 2 * k := by omega
    cases lt_or_ge (r1 + r2) k with
    | inl h => rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt h]; exact Nat.zero_le _
    | inr h =>
        rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt_le h hr]
        by_contra hc
        rw [not_le, Nat.lt_one_iff, add_eq_zero] at hc
        rw [Nat.div_eq_zero_iff hk, Nat.div_eq_zero_iff hk] at hc
        omega

    rw [Nat.div_add_mod x q, mul_add, mul_comm q, Nat.add_div_eq_mul_add_div _ _ hq]

      exact Nat.add_le_add (Nat.zero_le _) ((Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le hq).mpr (by linarith))

    cases H <;> have := Nat.le_div_iff_mul_le (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (Nat.pow_ne_zero _ hp.ne_zero)) |>.2 (by assumption) <;> linarith

    refine Finset.sum_subset (Finset.Ico_subset_Ico rfl.le (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.le_trans hk (Nat.le_succ _)))) (fun i _ mem ↦ ?_)
    rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt]
    exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_trans hk (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Finset.mem_Ico.mp mem).2)) (Nat.lt_pow_self hp.one_lt i)
  rw [h_sum m (by linarith), h_sum n (by linarith), h_sum (m+n) (by linarith), h_sum (2*m) (by linarith), h_sum (2*n) (by linarith)]
  repeat rw [← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  refine Finset.sum_le_sum (fun i _ ↦ ?_)
  set q := p^i
  have hq : 0 < q := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (Nat.pow_ne_zero _ hp.ne_zero)
  simp only [mul_two, Nat.add_div_eq_add_add_div _ _ hq]
  gcongr
  set r1 := m % q; set r2 := n % q
  have h1 : r1 < q := Nat.mod_lt _ hq
  have h2 : r2 < q := Nat.mod_lt _ hq
  rw [show r1 + r1 = 2 * r1 by ring, show r2 + r2 = 2 * r2 by ring]
  repeat rw [Nat.add_div_eq_add_add_div _ _ hq]
  rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt h1, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt h2]
  simp only [Nat.div_eq_zero_iff hq |>.mpr h1, Nat.div_eq_zero_iff hq |>.mpr h2, zero_add, add_zero]
  cases Nat.lt_or_ge (r1 + r2) q with
  | inl h => rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt h]; simp
  | inr h =>
    rw [Nat.div_eq_of_lt (by linarith)]; simp
    by_contra hc; push_neg at hc
    have c1 : 2 * r1 < q := Nat.div_eq_zero_iff hq |>.mp (by linarith [hc.1])
    have c2 : 2 * r2 < q := Nat.div_eq_zero_iff hq |>.mp (by linarith [hc.2])
    linarith

induction m generalizing n with
  | zero => simp; exact Nat.factorial_mul_factorial_dvd_factorial_add n n
  | succ m ih =>
    let A (m n : ℕ) := m ! * n ! * (m + n)!
    let B (m n : ℕ) := (2 * m)! * (2 * n)!
    have h1 : A m n ∣ B m n := ih n
    have h2 : A m (n + 1) ∣ B m (n + 1) := ih (n + 1)
    have key : (n + 1) * B (m + 1) n + (m + 1) * B m (n + 1) = 
               4 * (m + 1) * (n + 1) * (m + n + 1) * B m n := by
      dsimp [B]
      rw [Nat.mul_add 2 m, Nat.mul_add 2 n]
      simp only [Nat.factorial_succ, mul_one, Nat.mul_succ]
      ring
    have eq_A : (n + 1) * A (m + 1) n = (m + 1) * A m (n + 1) := by
      dsimp [A]; simp only [Nat.factorial_succ]; ring
    have div_term2 : (n + 1) * A (m + 1) n ∣ (m + 1) * B m (n + 1) := by
      rw [eq_A]; exact Nat.mul_dvd_mul_left _ h2
    have div_rhs : (n + 1) * A (m + 1) n ∣ 4 * (m + 1) * (n + 1) * (m + n + 1) * B m n := by
      dsimp [A]
      rw [Nat.factorial_succ m, Nat.factorial_succ (m + n)]
      refine Nat.dvd_trans (Dvd.intro 4 ?_) (Nat.mul_dvd_mul_left _ h1)
      ring
    rw [← key] at div_rhs
    exact Nat.dvd_of_mul_dvd_mul_left n.succ_pos ((Nat.dvd_add_iff_left div_term2).mpr div_rhs)
